# Re-run Notes

The generated outputs in this folder were produced with synthetic data using the formulas in the formal theorem files. They are intended for explanation and slide visuals, not platform exploitation.

Outputs:
- `outputs/ranking_boost_curve.csv`
- `outputs/feedback_multiplier_paths.csv`
- `outputs/toy_events.csv`
- `outputs/observed_coordination_edges.csv`
- `outputs/coordination_null_distribution.csv`
- `outputs/royalty_pool_fake_streams.csv`

Figures:
- `figures/ranking_boost_curve.png`
- `figures/feedback_multiplier_paths.png`
- `figures/coordination_null_distribution.png`
- `figures/toy_coordination_network.png`
- `figures/royalty_pool_fake_streams.png`
